name: Metal Rectangle A-Frame Pergola Rust Resistant Outdoor Patio Dining Table Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Create a beautiful dining space surrounded with your favorite plants with the Rectangle A-Frame Pergola Patio Dining Table from Room Essentials™. This rectangle dining table features an A-frame with hooks for holding planters. Made of steel in a powder-coated finish, this patio dining table has a slatted tabletop with an umbrella hole to keep you all shaded, and it's rust resistant for lasting outdoor use.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
